text.title: Design Decision Log Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Design Decision Log Template end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: intake-trigger
step.action: Quote the triggering question verbatim; capture the thread permalink.

step.name: enumerate-alternatives
step.action: List ≥2 alternatives with a one-line rejection reason each.

step.name: draft-decision
step.action: Write the decision in active voice ('We will…').

step.name: assign-owner-and-status
step.action: Set owner to a named handle; status=Accepted (default).

step.name: assign-row-id-and-store
step.action: Allocate next sequential row_id; run validator; append to the log.
